instructions: Add a 'Supported Architectures' section to README.md and docs/HANDBOOK.md to clarify that Calamares installer, snapshot-based updates, and ZRAM compression are only available on x86_64.
Indicate that i686 and aarch64 are experimental/community-supported.
constraints: Limit modifications strictly to README.md and docs/HANDBOOK.md.
Do not alter build scripts or workflows.
Ensure documentation explicitly mentions x86_64, i686, and aarch64 differences.
